# host_timezone (Resource)

Manages the system timezone.

On Linux this resource uses `timedatectl`. On macOS it uses `systemsetup`. Destroying the resource removes it from Terraform state and leaves the live timezone unchanged.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "host_timezone" "default" {
  name = "America/Los_Angeles"
}
```

## Import

Import the current timezone by name:

```shell
terraform import host_timezone.default America/Los_Angeles
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) IANA timezone name, such as `America/Los_Angeles` or `UTC`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier, equal to `name`.
